test.name: Harness View Prints File Content

kw.msg: osascript failed: 100:116: execution error: System Events got an error: osascript is not allowed assistive access. (-25211)

kw.doc: Launch Harness preview app and wait for window.
kw.status: ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: ''

test.doc: P4 Track 3: harness view outputs file to stdout
